refined_caption: The hospital waiting room is crowded with multiple patients seated in chairs. A man in a protective suit is also present.
complaint_description: I visited the hospital today and was shocked to see the waiting room overcrowded with patients. There were not enough chairs for everyone, and it was difficult to maintain social distancing. The atmosphere was uncomfortable and stressful.
voice_text: The waiting room is super crowded, it's really uncomfortable. I don't feel safe with so many people around.
